name: SDLC Optional Assessor Blocking Pipeline
description: Software-delivery pipeline with one required assessor and one optional assessor.
outcome: Required assessments always gate progress; optional assessments only gate once instantiated.

definition.process_instructions: The solution design architect defines the change against the seeded Python standard-library CLI repository. The application delivery engineer implements it in that repository and verifies with ./scripts/verify.sh. The delivery quality assessor is always required. The security risk assessor is optional and may be skipped or instantiated based on the authored scenario contract. If the optional assessment is instantiated, its result must be respected.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

parameters.name: change_request
parameters.description: Concrete repository change to implement in the seeded CLI workspace

parameters.name: optional_assessor_contract
parameters.description: When to skip or instantiate the optional assessor and what it must enforce

parameters.name: initial_revision_scope
parameters.description: What revision 1 must deliver before any required security rework is applied

parameters.name: rework_completion_scope
parameters.description: What revision 2 must add to satisfy the optional security assessor after request_changes

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.

checkpoints.name: implementation
checkpoints.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
